Document merge/insert rules: Use a Document object for each split part; the callback receives a Node, so import it into a new Document.
Loading rules: Keep using Document(string) constructor for loading the source DOCX.
load: Load the source DOCX using new Document(path).
Saving/Export rules: Save each part document with a distinct filename (e.g., Section_1.docx).
save: Persist each summary with Document.Save(path).
Layout rules: Cast the result of Clone(true) to Section because Clone returns a Node.
Cast the result of Section.Clone(true) to Section because Clone returns Node.
Remove the default empty section from the new document before appending the cloned section.
Cast the result of Section.Clone(true) to Section because Clone returns a Node.
